reason: Finish work checklist
Code quality check spec
Check implementation against acceptance criteria and non-goals
Verify no duplicate API wrapper or route ownership drift
Quality checklist for frontend bugfix and required verification
Review useEffect/useCallback ordering and state convergence
Verify loading/error/list state ownership remains local and stable
Check defensive response parsing and no blind res.data assumptions
Verify no duplicate implementation path was introduced
Review API/frontend contract alignment
Verify loading convergence, effect guards, and iframe behavior did not regress
Verify /games stays in central API facade and stale-token handling is safe
Ensure test is updated or still covers the fixed contract
Verify route mapping remains unchanged
Verify route switching behavior remains compatible
Check backend contract only if implementation touches backend
Check backend service only if implementation touches backend
Verify UI change stays scoped and accessible
Verify no duplicate backend entry point if backend is touched
Verify backend response/status contract if backend is touched
Check backend changes only if required by API abnormality
Verify no DB/schema drift introduced
Check implementation against research findings and boundaries
